'''yazulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niceness|niceness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niceness|niceness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yazulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzilith|yæzilith]] || [[word:yæzilij|yæzilij]] || [[word:yæzilish|yæzilish]] || [[word:yæzili|yæzili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazuzuluth|yazuzuluth]] || [[word:yazuzuluj|yazuzuluj]] || [[word:yazuzulush|yazuzulush]] || [[word:yazuzulu|yazuzulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazuluth|yazuluth]] || [[word:yazuluj|yazuluj]] || [[word:yazulush|yazulush]] || [[word:yazulu|yazulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazufluth|yazufluth]] || [[word:yazufluj|yazufluj]] || [[word:yazuflush|yazuflush]] || [[word:yazufluf|yazufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazuluthu|yazuluthu]] || [[word:yazuluju|yazuluju]] || [[word:yazulushu|yazulushu]] || [[word:yazuluku|yazuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazuluth|yazuluth]] || [[word:yazuluj|yazuluj]] || [[word:yazulush|yazulush]] || [[word:yazulu|yazulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazuluthul|yazuluthul]] || [[word:yazulujul|yazulujul]] || [[word:yazulushul|yazulushul]] || [[word:yazulukul|yazulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazuluthuthu|yazuluthuthu]] || [[word:yazulujuju|yazulujuju]] || [[word:yazulushushu|yazulushushu]] || [[word:yazuluku|yazuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazuluthun|yazuluthun]] || [[word:yazulujun|yazulujun]] || [[word:yazulushun|yazulushun]] || [[word:yazulukun|yazulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazuluthuoro|yazuluthuoro]] || [[word:yazulujuoro|yazulujuoro]] || [[word:yazulushuoro|yazulushuoro]] || [[word:yazulukuoro|yazulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
